items.creator: Helena Woods
items.title: Who are the most attractive zodiac signs? My personal preference (and I’ve dated all the zodiac
items.summary:
Who are the most attractive zodiac signs? My personal preference (and I’ve dated all the zodiac signs except for Gemini and Cancer) 👇

1️⃣ Virgo (it was my goal to marry a Virgo man and I’m so glad I did.) Everyone needs a Virgo in their life to keep them grounded. The thoughtfulness and consideration of a Virgo man is next level.

2️⃣ Aquarius - the most interesting conversations EVER. I’ve dated many Aquarian men before I met my husband and the reason is simple: mental stimulation. My Gemini Mercury is never bored in the presence of an Aquarian. The cool, detached way of approaching intellectual conversation is 🙌 And they have great fashion style (very important 💅) and their eyes sparkle when they talk about something they’re interested in. 🤩The best problem solvers out there aside from Virgos. 

3️⃣ Scorpio - Scorpio men are hot. It’s an energy thing. We all know it. No need to even go further into this discussion 😂 

Ladies, who are your favs? 👇

items.creator: 占星播客
items.title: Thema Mundi: How the Planets Came to Rule Two Zodiac Signs
items.summary:
This is an animation of an ancient Persian myth about how the traditional planets came to rule two signs of the zodiac in astrology. 

The narration and script with some embellishments on the original story are by Chris Brennan, and the animation was done by Jack Cusumano.

The original myth is preserved in Codices Vaticani 15, fol. 229, edited in CCAG 5, pt. 2 pp. 130-37 by I. Bidez, privately translated by Demetra George.
